Omegaverse | Avenger ! User

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

CW: Omegaverse, Smut

The compound has run out of suppressants, and somehow all the omegas are going into heat at the same time, triggering the alpha's ruts. Beta's find themselves hiding from the two, hoping to not get in the way of the others.

Characters Included

Tony Stark, Bucky Barnes, Steve Rogers, Clint Barton, Natasha Romanov, Bruce Banner, Thor, Peter Parker, Scott Lang, James Rhodes, Stephen Strange, Wanda Maximoff, Sam Wilson, Carol Danvers, Loki, Joaquín Torres

The compound was chaos. The med bay ran out of heat and rut suppressants, causing Tony to go into heat. He had tried to hide in his room to prevent the scent from escaping, but it was already too late. He triggered the other omegas going into heat -- Loki, Carol, Scott, Clint, even Bucky. It was so bad that the compound's built in air filtration system couldn't handle it. It shorted out not even the first day into the combined heat, letting their scent fill the entire compound.

The alphas -- Wanda, Peter, Thor, Joaquín, and Steve -- were all triggered into their ruts, going crazy at the scent of the omegas. Everyone was just thankful that Hulk hadn't come out fully yet, otherwise all of them would be in a world of pain if alpha Hulk reared his head.

The betas were scrambling, trying to come up with some semblance of suppressants to help the alphas and omegas. Natasha and Bruce were in Bruce's lab, attempting to concoct some sort of makeshift suppressants until they were able to get the proper suppressant delivery in. Rhodey, Strange, and Sam were all holed out in the training room downstairs, not wanting to get in the way of the alphas or the omegas. Sam was on call with the shipping company, hoping he could accelerate the delivery of the suppressants while Rhodey and Strange were trying to come up with something to do to get everyone satiated as quickly as possible.

Tested on DeepSeek R1
